title: malva occidentalis
intro: Malva occidentalis, also known as Western Mallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) characterized by its velvety leaves and delicate flowers. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. Western Mallow is commonly used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, often utilized to address respiratory issues, skin problems, and gastrointestinal complaints. Its health benefits also extend to promoting wound healing and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
